This advisory has been withdrawn because it is a duplicate of GHSA-9wcp-9r3j-383q. This link is maintained to preserve external references.

## Original Description

n8n before 1.123.64, 2.29.8, and 2.30.1 contains a stored DOM cross-site scripting vulnerability in the Resource Locator component, which passes the workflow-persisted cachedResultUrl parameter to window.open() without scheme validation. An attacker with workflow creation/editing privileges can craft a workflow with a malicious (e.g., javascript:) scheme in cachedResultUrl; when a victim opens the crafted workflow and interacts with external links, the payload executes in the victim's browser.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-h5xr-fqvj-253p", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-07-22T17:58:48Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-h5xr-fqvj-253p", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-h5xr-fqvj-253p"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-07-22T12:18:19Z", "published_at": "2026-07-22T12:32:17Z", "references": ["https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/security/advisories/GHSA-9wcp-9r3j-383q", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-65592", "https://www.vulncheck.com/advisories/n8n-before-stored-dom-xss-via-cachedresulturl", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-h5xr-fqvj-253p"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "", "summary": "Duplicate Advisory: Stored DOM XSS via Resource Locator `cachedResultUrl`", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-22T17:58:50Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-h5xr-fqvj-253p", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": null, "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "n8n"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 1.123.64"}], "withdrawn_at": "2026-07-22T17:58:48Z"}

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: Duplicate Advisory: Stored DOM XSS via Resource Locator `cachedResultUrl`
